iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 11% (stable). Day 22 Hour 15 - DETERRENT. Natanz struck overnight but IAEA confirms no radiation leak. No enrichment escalation. Pezeshkian: no nukes. Updated 2026-03-21T15:04:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 22 Hour 15 - IMMINENT. CONTRADICTION DEEPENS: Trump 'winding down' + 'close to objectives' vs Israel Katz 'strikes will intensify'. CENTCOM degrades Hormuz capability. 22 nations pledge Hormuz safe passage. Drone kills Baghdad intel officer. 70th+ IRGC wave. Updated 2026-03-21T15:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Trump: US 'winding down' Iran war - 'very close to meeting our objectives'
latest_news.text: Trump posts on Truth Social that US is 'considering winding down military operations' and 'very close to meeting our objectives'. Strongest de-escalation signal yet. However, Iran says no reduction in military activity observed.

latest_news.headline: CENTCOM destroys underground Hormuz cruise missile facility + radar relays
latest_news.text: US CENTCOM commander Adm. Cooper confirms destruction of underground cruise missile storage facility at Hormuz, plus intelligence support sites and radar relays. Iran's ability to threaten shipping 'degraded'.

latest_news.headline: Drone strike kills officer at Iraq intelligence HQ in Baghdad
latest_news.text: Officer killed, second wounded in drone attack on Iraqi intelligence headquarters in Baghdad at 10am local time. Intelligence service blames 'outlaw groups'. Escalation in Iraq continues.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 74% (up). Day 22 Hour 15 - IMMINENT. 4 Hezbollah killed overnight (ground+air+tanks). IDF continues Litani push. Katz says strikes will 'intensify'. Beirut strikes ongoing. Updated 2026-03-21T15:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut - 7 neighborhoods evacuated
latest_news.text: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut early Saturday. Evacuation warnings for 7 neighborhoods in southern suburbs. Jets bombed Beirut at 3am. Ghandouriyeh house strike kills 1, wounds 2.

latest_news.headline: WaPo: Israel strikes Hezbollah health center, kills 12 medical workers
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit Hezbollah-run health center in southern Lebanon, killed 12 medical workers. Israel widens campaign beyond fighters to civilian infrastructure.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 22 Hour 15 - DETERRENT. No new developments. 3 Patriot batteries at Incirlik. NATO intercepts ongoing. Updated 2026-03-21T15:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 4% (stable). Day 22 Hour 15 - DETERRENT. No new developments. Updated 2026-03-21T15:04:00Z

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 12% (up). Day 22 Hour 15 - DETERRENT. Russia helping Iran with intel sharing. No direct NATO-Russia confrontation. Updated 2026-03-21T15:04:00Z

china.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 5% (stable). Day 22 Hour 15 - DETERRENT. No PLA activity. US-China trade talks progressing. Status quo. Updated 2026-03-21T15:04:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 33% (up). Day 22 Hour 15 - CRITICAL. Russia refuses Mar 21 talks. Deadliest day 1,610 KIA. Drone swarms Moscow. No ceasefire path. Updated 2026-03-21T15:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Putin's forces suffer DEADLIEST day of 2026 - 1,610 killed in 24h
latest_news.text: Russian forces suffer deadliest day of 2026: 1,610 killed in past 24 hours. Total Russian casualties since Feb 2022 now approximately 1,285,700. Fighting intense despite peace talk pauses.

latest_news.headline: Ukrainian drone swarms target Moscow overnight
latest_news.text: Swarms of Ukrainian drones targeted Moscow overnight, mayor confirms. Russian air defense intercepted attacks. Continued deep-strike capability demonstration.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 34% (stable). Day 22 Hour 15 - CRITICAL. Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 24. TTP 3-day truce holding. Post-Eid resumption feared. Updated 2026-03-21T15:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 15. DE-ESCALATION: Trump 'winding down' + 'close to objectives'. CENTCOM degrades Hormuz. 22-nation coalition forming for safe passage. IAEA confirms no radiation at Natanz. ESCALATION: Israel Katz says strikes 'will intensify'. Tehran ballistic production 'degraded' (implies continued strikes). Baghdad intel drone strike. Diego Garcia missile fire. 4 Hezbollah killed overnight. UK Trident base breach attempt. NET: US pulling back rhetorically while Israel doubles down. Contradiction between Trump 'winding down' and Katz 'intensify' is the defining tension of Day 22.

latest_news.headline: Israeli DM Katz: Strikes on Iran will 'significantly escalate' this week
latest_news.text: Defense Minister Katz says IDF+US strikes 'will rise significantly' this week — targeting Iran's leaders to 'decapitate commanders and destroy strategic capabilities'. Directly contradicts Trump 'winding down' rhetoric.

latest_news.headline: Iranian cluster munition hits daycare in Rishon Lezion, Israel
latest_news.text: First responders work scene where cluster munition from Iranian ballistic missile hit daycare in Rishon Lezion, central Israel. Significant civilian casualties in central Israel — geographic expansion from border areas.

latest_news.headline: IAEA confirms NO radiation leak at Natanz after US-Israeli strikes
latest_news.text: UN nuclear watchdog confirms no radiation leak at Natanz enrichment facility after latest strikes. Reduces nuclear escalation risk despite facility damage.

latest_news.headline: Iran claims 3 strikes on US Embassy Baghdad logistics base
latest_news.text: Iran claims it targeted US Embassy logistics base in Baghdad 3 times today. Embassy has faced multiple rocket and drone attacks since war began. NATO just withdrew all troops from Iraq advisory mission.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 22, 15:04 UTC) - CONTRADICTION AT CORE: Trump 'winding down' vs Israel 'intensify'. CENTCOM degrades Hormuz — 22 nations pledge safe passage coalition. Baghdad intel HQ drone-killed. 4 Hezbollah dead in overnight ground ops. Natanz no radiation confirmed. Russia refuses peace talks. Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire holding through Eid (Mar 24). Diego Garcia missiles 'unsuccessful'. Updated 2026-03-21T15:04:00Z

de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 13. DE-ESCALATION: Trump "winding down" rhetoric, IAEA confirms no radiation at Natanz, Hormuz selectively easing, US oil sanctions relief. ESCALATION: Katz says strikes will "significantly escalate" this week, cluster munition hits Israeli daycare, Iran claims 3 strikes on US Embassy Baghdad, Iran warns UAE re: Ras al-Khaimah, Russia refuses peace talks. NET: Israel pushing escalation while Trump signals exit. US deploying MORE troops despite "winding down" talk. Contradiction deepens.
